description: dac-static.atlassian.com is Atlassian’s static asset host used to publish downloadable API description files referenced from Atlassian developer documentation. The host serves public OpenAPI artifacts rather than an interactive product API of its own.
summary: dac-static.atlassian.com publicly serves Atlassian machine-readable OpenAPI documents, including Jira Cloud and Confluence Data Center specs; no authenticated API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found on this host.
